title: Docs Categorized as a File
excerpt: Hello. Is there a way for monday.com to recognize a monday doc as a file? I’m building out a bunch of docs, but when I click on the item and go to files, I don’t see any docs that I created in the files section. Is there…

posts.author: Lucas2 (Lucas Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello. Is there a way for monday.com to recognize a monday doc as a file? I’m building out a bunch of docs, but when I click on the item and go to files, I don’t see any docs that I created in the files section. Is there a way to do this? If I have a lot of docs under one item, there’s no easy way to see a list of them. Thanks

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Lucas,

If I am understanding correctly, you should be able to see a list of your docs via the files column. Is this what you’re referring to?

posts.author: Lucas2 (Lucas Anderson)
posts.cookedHtml:
No, sorry

Screenshot 2024-01-18 0904291637×658 50.7 KB

Here’s an example. It would be nice if I could see my docs in the Files section when I click on an item

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for clarifying Lucas!

I am afraid at this time docs aren’t supported in the files gallery! Please submit this as a feature request so our community can add their vote and increase the likelihood for development
